faq.description: Returns, shipping, and buyer perks on the Affisell marketplace.
faq.cashbackBody: On partner product pages, part of the price may be credited to your wallet after payment is confirmed. Sign in before checkout: the balance applies automatically on your next eligible purchase.

contact.title: Contact Affisell
contact.description: Questions about an order, a return, or your cashback wallet? Email us — we reply within 2 business days.
